title: fix: resolve KPI dashboard Tinybird query timeouts
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tinybird learns to snack
gist.blurb: Splitting big queries into bite-sized chunks to keep our analytics dashboard happy and timeout-free.
gist.summary: Optimized internal KPI dashboard queries to fetch data week-by-week, resolving timeouts with Tinybird's free tier limits.
gist.impact: Internal metrics dashboards now load reliably without hitting query time limits.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a long tape of data one bite at a time instead of trying to swallow the whole roll. The bee watches with a stopwatch.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round Nomnom creature eating a data tape one bite at a time while the bee mascot holds a stopwatch. Lime green (#ecf874) digital background with chart lines. Soft pastel gradients. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic.
